name: X-Force Risky IP, Botnet
notes: This rule will detect when a local user or host is connecting to a botnet command and control server.
conditions_text: when the context is Local to Remote, Remote to Remote
when Destination IP is categorized by X-Force as Botnet Command and Control Server with confidence value greater than 85
TD_list: APPLY X-Force Risky IP, Botnet on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the context is Local to Remote, Remote to Remote
AND when Destination IP is categorized by X-Force as Botnet Command and Control Server with confidence value greater than 85
RED_list: Event name: X-Force Risky IP - Botnet
Event description: A local user or host is connecting to a botnet command and control server.
